arts.ttl: PSG Eye Bold Three-Way Swap Deal to Edge Liverpool for €180M-Rated Newcastle Star
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and for now, Alexander Isak is staying with Newcastle United. While there wasn’t much chatter about a move this winter, several clubs are likely to make another push in the summer. arts.ttl: 'I'm not lying': Andy Cole names the former Liverpool striker who is easily the best finisher he's ever seen
Inter Milan Plot Major Swoop for Liverpool, PSG Target With €6M-per-Year Wage Offer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months and nearly brought him in last summer. Now, they’re making another push to seal the deal. Journalist Christian Falk recently reported that PSG’s interest in Kimmich is still strong, as his contract situation at Bayern remains unresolved. arts.ttl: 'My gut feeling' - Michael Owen reveals Trent Alexander-Arnold theory amid Liverpool uncertainty
arts.sum: Michael Owen knows what it is like to move from Liverpool to Real Madrid as Trent Alexander-Arnold faces a familiar decision
